rawContent:
Tweet by @itsolelehmann (Ole Lehmann)
Author bio: I help non-technical people make more money with AI. AI connoisseur, robotics maxi, eu/acc supporter, dad, techno-optimist
Text: this is probably the AI workflow that's directly made me the most money.

it's a Claude skill that simulates 5 different buyer personas browsing your page:

1. the shut-up-and-take-my-money buyer (if they won't convert, nobody will)

2. the skeptic (been burned before, scanning for bs)

3. the price-conscious buyer (doing cost math the whole time)

4. the confused visitor (figuring out what this is or if it's for them)

5. the comparison shopper (reading yours with competitor tabs open)

they walk through your page section by section narrating their thought process out loud

then everything gets synthesized, telling you:

> who would buy
> who would bounce
> and exactly what to fix so they all convert

works on landing pages, emails, ads, proposals, or anything you sell to people

so you can find what's blocking your sales and improve your conversion rate
